message.content: @startuml actor ShipCaptain participant ":System" as System ShipCaptain -> System : 1 ask the system to see how much the vessel sink\n2 ask the ship's captain to the ship data\nto indentify and the voyage id to know \nthe total of containers activate System note right #LightBlue;line:green;text:red;shadow:false;font size=8pt get: get all information about this operation from DBMS end note deactivate System ShipCaptain --> System :3 introduces the data asked activate System autonumber "4 " "" ref over System make calculation:\ncalculate if there are enough space for new container in order not to make the boat sank end ref return "#09F shows the results and informs the success of the operation" @enduml
